feat.name: Jotun's Boost
feat.text: Your giant might allows you to pick up your allies and hurl them across the battlefield. Pick up an adjacent willing ally who is smaller than you and toss them to an unoccupied space you can see within 25 feet; if you have two hands free, you can instead toss them into a space within 30 feet. Your ally’s movement doesn’t trigger reactions. Your ally ends this movement on their feet and doesn’t take damage from the fall. If your ally ends this movement within melee reach of at least one enemy, they can make a melee Strike against an enemy within their reach as a reaction.

traits.name: Jotunborn
traits.text: A creature with this trait is a member of the jotunborn ancestry. Jotunborn are large people forged from the blood of an ancient group of giants called titans and usually have low-light vision. An ability with this trait can be used or selected only by jotunborn. A weapon with this trait is created and used by jotunborn.

traits.name: Manipulate
traits.text: You must physically manipulate an item or make gestures to use an action with this trait. Creatures without a suitable appendage can’t perform actions with this trait. Manipulate actions often trigger reactions.

feat.requirement: You have at least one hand free and are adjacent to an ally.
